title: lactuca tetrantha
intro: Lactuca tetrantha, also known as the four-flowered milk thistle, is a plant species in the dandelion tribe of the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant contains lactones, flavonoids, and saponins, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its various health benefits, including improving digestion, reducing stress, and promoting liver health. Lactuca tetrantha can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
